title: Bridge Essay: Concentrative (Sahaj Samadhi) meditation training and visual awareness: An fMRI

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Formless/Absorption** (Phase 8) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Formless/Absorption to mechanistic neuroscience.

**Concentrative (Sahaj Samadhi) meditation training and visual awareness: An fMRI study on color afterimages.** — Prog Brain Res. PMID: 30732837. DOI: 10.1016/bs.pbr.2018.10.026. All of us consciously experience the world around us through our sensory modalities. Empirical studies on the relationship between attention and awareness have shown that attention does influence perceptual experience or appearance in addition to better performance in perceptual tasks. The practice of meditation also changes perceptual experience in addition to better perceptual performance.
